design_philosophy: Strict data density. Function over form. Zero unnecessary decorations. Exposed grid lines. High contrast for readability of fast-moving numbers. Emotional tone: Elite precision, command-center focus.

layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Heavy use of border-collapse style layouts for tables and stats.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Cardless architecture. Flat background (bg-[#0C0E12]), 1px solid border (border-[#1E2229]), zero shadow, zero border-radius (rounded-none).

navigation.style: Solid background #060709 with hard bottom border #1E2229. Contains mode switchers.

stats_cards.layout: Grid cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 across the top
stats_cards.style: Bordered cells. Mono font values. Colored text for profit/winrate depending on positive/negative.

data_tables.style: Dense tabular layout. text-sm body, text-xs header. 1px borders for all cells. Hover effects on rows (bg-[#13161C]).

forms.usage: Settings Page for API keys and thresholds
forms.style: Brutalist forms. Square corners (rounded-none), dark inputs, thin borders. Primary CTA is Terminal Green.

icons.instructions: Run: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react. Use Regular or Light weights.

animations.micro_interactions: Instant changes. No slow transitions. Fast, responsive feel.
animations.data_updates: Momentary cell background flash (green/red) when a price updates.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use .js and .jsx extensions for React files. Do not use TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).
Initialize Tailwind with the specific colors provided in this JSON.
Set Shadcn UI border-radius to 0 globally in CSS variables.
Build the dashboard using pure CSS Grid with exposed 1px borders, avoiding generic soft cards.
Use IBM Plex Sans for UI text and IBM Plex Mono strictly for all numbers and tables.
Implement simulated real-time data flashing (background turns briefly green or red on value change).
Include the exact data-testids on interactive elements.
